name: BROADWAY FINANCIAL CORP \DE\
summary: Broadway Financial Corp (BYFC) is a Delaware-incorporated financial holding company operating through its banking subsidiary. The company provides mortgage and commercial loans, as well as deposit operations. It holds a CDFI (Community Development Financial Institution) certification, which enables it to receive grant income awards. The company focuses on residential and commercial real estate lending markets.

products.name: Mortgage Loans
products.description: Residential mortgage lending products offered to customers in its lending markets.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Commercial lending products offered to businesses in its lending markets.

products.name: Deposit Operations
products.description: Deposit-taking services provided through its banking subsidiary.
